settings.headline: The Halo
settings.subheadline: Hand-blown smoked-glass dome on a brushed-chrome base. Warm 2700K spiral filament. Plug-in. No drilling. Designed for the apartment, made to outlive it.

settings.title: Designed for the apartment. Made to outlive it.
settings.content: You can't paint the walls. You can't change the overhead light. So we built one object that changes the whole room. Smoked glass, brushed chrome, warm spiral filament — set it down and the apartment finally feels lived-in.

settings.title: Plug it in. That's the whole installation.
settings.content: No drilling. No hardwiring. No landlord. Standard outlet, 6ft cord, inline switch. When you move, you take it with you.

settings.title: Light that flatters everything in the photo
settings.content: 2700K spiral filament behind smoked glass. The harsh point of light gets eaten by the tint, and what comes out is the same warm glow that golden hour leaves on a wall at 6:47pm. iPhone cameras love it.

settings.title: Tap to dim
settings.description: Three brightness levels. Touch the chrome base to cycle.

settings.title: Plug-in, anywhere
settings.description: Standard outlet. 6ft fabric-wrapped cord. No hardwiring.

settings.title: Warm spiral filament
settings.description: 2700K E26 LED, included. Visible behind smoked glass, not hidden.

settings.title: 5-year warranty
settings.description: If anything fails, we replace it.

settings.title: 30-night trial
settings.description: Live with it. Send it back if it isn't right.

settings.title: Bulb included
settings.description: 2700K E26 spiral filament LED in the box.

settings.author: Jane D., Brooklyn
settings.content: I've moved four times in five years. The Halo is the only thing in every photo.

settings.author: Marcus L., Austin
settings.content: Killed the overhead the day it arrived. Haven't turned it back on since.

settings.author: Sara P., Los Angeles
settings.content: My boyfriend asked if I'd had the apartment professionally lit. It's one lamp.

settings.question: Do I need to install anything?
settings.answer: No. The Halo plugs into any standard outlet. No hardwiring, no drilling, no landlord conversation.

settings.question: Will it be bright enough as my main light?
settings.answer: Honest answer: the Halo is a mood and task lamp, not a ceiling replacement. In a small studio, pair it with a second to fully ditch the overhead. In a 1-bed, one Halo handles the living-room corner beautifully.

settings.question: Is the smoked glass actually glass?
settings.answer: Yes. Hand-blown, hand-tinted. Each one has tiny variations in the smoke — that's how you know it's real and not press-molded plastic.

settings.question: What if it breaks in the mail?
settings.answer: Send a photo of the box and we ship a replacement same-day. No forms, no phone trees.

settings.question: Does it use a weird proprietary bulb?
settings.answer: No. Standard E26 socket. The 2700K spiral filament LED is in the box, but any 2700K filament bulb works if you ever want to swap.

settings.question: What if I move and it breaks?
settings.answer: The 5-year warranty covers normal wear, including transit damage during a move.

settings.question: What if I don't like it?
settings.answer: Send it back within 30 nights for a full refund. We cover return shipping.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: 3–5 business days in the US, free and tracked.
